entries.title: Naming & Conventions
entries.description: All public widgets, classes, enums, and extensions use the Oi prefix. Factory constructors for variants, English-readable props, required accessibility props, verb callbacks, and descriptive booleans.
issues: OiButton.split() uses `Widget dropdown` parameter instead of spec-required `List<OiMenuItem> dropdownItems`
OiUndoAction uses field named `undo` instead of spec-required `reverse`
OiUndoAction.reverse should be callback but is named differently breaking API contract

entries.title: Package Structure
entries.description: All required files and directories present under lib/src/ matching the spec-defined hierarchy: foundation, primitives, components, composites, modules, tools, utils.
evidence: lib/src/foundation/ (18 files including theme/ subdirectory with all 9 theme files)
issues: Empty directories exist: lib/src/layouts/, lib/src/theme/, lib/src/widgets/ — these are listed in git but contain no files, indicating planned but not-yet-used structure
Extra persistence/ subdirectory in foundation/ not in spec (additive, not breaking)
No oi_platform.dart listed in spec but lib/src/foundation/oi_platform.dart exists (additive)

entries.title: Theming System
entries.description: Complete theme system: OiThemeData with all factories, OiColorScheme, OiTextTheme, OiSpacingScale, OiRadiusScale, OiShadowScale, OiAnimationConfig, OiEffectsTheme (with OiHaloStyle and OiInteractiveStyle), OiDecorationTheme (with OiBorderStyle and OiGradientStyle), OiComponentThemes with per-component overrides, BuildContext theme extension, and OiThemeScope + per-component scopes.
issues: OiButtonThemeScope does not exist anywhere in the codebase — spec explicitly requires `OiButtonThemeScope(theme: OiButtonThemeData(height: 48), child: MyArea())`
Theme access extension is named `OiBuildContextThemeExt` not `OiThemeExt` as specified — functionally equivalent but API name differs
OiPerformanceConfig exists in oi_animation_config.dart but is not exposed via OiThemeData.components or OiApp constructor — referenced in comments in oi_surface.dart but not wired up
OiColorScheme lacks `chart` field (List<Color>) documented in spec

entries.title: Accessibility Enforcement
entries.description: Enforced: OiImage requires alt, OiButton requires label, OiIcon requires label. OiA11y static utility class. Focus ring always visible. Reduced motion checks. Color never sole indicator. Touch target enforcement at 48x48dp.
evidence: lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart:33-84 (OiA11y with minTouchTarget, announce, reducedMotion, highContrast, textScale, boldText)
issues: OiShortcutScope is absent — spec rule 9 requires all keyboard shortcuts have labels auto-registered in command bar and help dialog, but no OiShortcutScope implementation exists
Cannot verify that every overlay/dialog/panel requires label param without reading all 4 overlay files — overlays system is generic show() API
OiA11y.minTouchTarget is a static method taking BuildContext, but spec defines it as a static getter `static double get minTouchTarget` — API surface differs
Bold text preference: OiA11y.boldText() returns bool but there is no evidence OiTextTheme adjusts weights accordingly when active
High contrast border enforcement (2px minimum) not verified as actually applied in component rendering

entries.title: Composition Map
entries.description: Higher-tier widgets compose lower-tier ones per the defined tree. OiButton wraps OiTappable, OiCard wraps OiSurface, OiDialog wraps OiSurface + OiFocusTrap, OiVirtualList used by table/tree/chat, etc.
issues: OiOverlays is a generic show() API — OiDialog, OiToast, OiPanel, OiSheet, OiPopover, OiContextMenu do not use it for the high-level typed API the composition map implies
Cannot verify OiArrowNav is composed by OiSelect, OiComboBox, OiCommandBar without reading those files — composition map claims 6 consumers
OiInfiniteScroll composition with OiChat/OiActivityFeed not verified
OiReorderable composition with OiKanban/OiTagInput not verified
OiAnimatedList used by OiToast stack not verified — OiToast is a standalone overlay
OiStagger use in OiNavMenu/OiDashboard/OiCommandBar not verified

entries.title: Tier 0: Foundation
entries.description: OiApp (root widget replacing MaterialApp), OiOverlays (singleton overlay service with typed methods), OiUndoStack (global undo/redo with toast integration), OiResponsive (5 breakpoints, adaptive helpers).
evidence: lib/src/foundation/oi_overlays.dart:1-230 (OiOverlaysService with show() and dismissAll(), OiOverlayHandle with dismiss() and update())
issues: OiOverlays is missing ALL typed convenience methods: panel(), sheet(), dialog(), toast(), commandBar(), search(), popover(), contextMenu() — only show() and dismissAll() exist. This is the single largest API gap in the library.
OiApp does not inject OiTourScope — spec says OiApp provides tour system
OiApp does not inject OiShortcutScope — spec says OiApp provides global keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z, Ctrl+K, ? help)
OiApp constructor does not accept OiPerformanceConfig parameter — OiPerformanceConfig exists in oi_animation_config.dart but is not wired into OiApp
OiUndoAction missing `showToast: bool` field — no mechanism to auto-show undo toast
OiUndoAction missing `expiry: Duration?` field — no auto-commit support
OiUndoStack does not integrate with OiOverlays to display undo toast even as a manual step

OiApp test coverage is 6/17 required test cases (35%) — missing: Ctrl+Z undo, Cmd+Z on macOS, safe area, OiPlatform injection, orientation change, keyboard visibility, system back, performance tier auto-detection
OiOverlays: spec requires ESC dismisses topmost overlay, Z-order toast above panel above dialog — none of these tested

entries.title: Tier 1: Primitives
entries.description: All primitive widgets: OiTappable, OiFocusTrap, OiLabel, OiIcon, OiImage, OiSurface, OiDivider, OiRawInput, layout primitives, overlay primitives, scroll primitives, gesture primitives, drag & drop primitives, clipboard primitives, animation primitives.
evidence: lib/src/primitives/display/ (5 files: label, icon, image, surface, divider)
lib/src/primitives/layout/ (8 files: row, column, grid, masonry, container, spacer, wrap_layout, aspect_ratio)
lib/src/primitives/animation/ (6 files: animated_list, stagger, shimmer, pulse, morph, spring)
issues: OiTappable test coverage: 13 of spec-required 35+ test cases (37%) — missing responsive tests: press delay in scrollables, secondary tap fallback on touch, active state press delay, right-click fires onSecondaryTap on desktop
OiImage missing `srcSet` parameter for responsive image loading at different device pixel ratios
OiImage `lazy` parameter exists but implementation uses `FilterQuality.low` rather than actual deferred loading
OiLabel responsive font scaling not fully verified — only display/h1/h2 scale by 1.0/1.1/1.2 but spec requires breakpoint-aware scaling
OiRow missing `collapse` parameter — spec requires `OiRow({..., OiBreakpoint? collapse})` for row-to-column responsive collapse
OiContainer adaptive padding: spec defines exact gutter values (16/24/32/40/48) — implementation present in responsive.dart but OiContainer itself may not reference these
OiFloating compact → bottom-anchored mode not verified
OiVirtualList missing `onRefresh` (pull-to-refresh) parameter
OiReorderable is only 80 lines — spec requires grid variant (OiReorderable.grid()), drag handles with 48dp touch targets, auto-scroll during reorder

entries.title: Tier 2: Components
entries.description: All standalone UI components composing Tier 1 primitives: buttons (4), inputs (12), inline edit (5), display (13), feedback (5), overlays (4), navigation (8), panels (3). Total 54 component files.
evidence: lib/src/components/buttons/ (4 files: button:889, icon_button:58, toggle_button:183, button_group:329)
lib/src/components/inputs/ (12 files: text_input:206, number:199, date:281, time:299, select:266, tag:256, checkbox:175, switch:145, radio:179, slider:317, color:278, file:227)
lib/src/components/inline_edit/ (5 files: editable:98, text:183, select:76, date:77, number:83)

lib/src/components/display/ (13 files including card:115, badge:250, avatar:259, tooltip:130, popover:91, list_tile:111, metric:126, progress:313, code_block:234, diff_view:206, markdown:344, empty_state:83, skeleton_group:123)
lib/src/components/feedback/ (5 files: star_rating:185, scale_rating:120, thumbs:108, reaction_bar:203, sentiment:82)
lib/src/components/overlays/ (4 files: dialog:192, toast:350, context_menu:327, sheet:373)
lib/src/components/navigation/ (8 files: tabs:373, accordion:187, breadcrumbs:221, date_picker:317, time_picker:231, emoji_picker:567, bottom_bar:200, drawer:98)
issues: OiButton.split() signature uses `Widget dropdown` instead of spec-required `List<OiMenuItem> dropdownItems` — consumers cannot pass a typed list of menu items
OiButton test coverage: 29 of spec-required 60+ test cases (48%) — missing golden tests for all variants, countdown behavior, confirm behavior, theme scope override
No golden tests exist at all (golden/ directory is empty) — spec requires golden regression tests for every button variant in light/dark theme
OiIconButton (58 lines) appears to be a very thin wrapper — spec says it IS OiButton.icon variant, suggesting potential duplication
OiCard (115 lines) interactive mode composition with OiTappable should be verified — spec requires OiCard wraps OiTappable when interactive
OiDialog (192 lines) — spec requires it use OiFocusTrap internally, requires `label` for screen reader announcement; not verified
OiToast (350 lines) — spec requires it be an OiSurface; whether it respects safe area on bottom not verified
OiSheet (373 lines) — snap points, safe area, swipe-to-dismiss not verified as implemented

entries.title: Tier 3: Composites
entries.description: All complex widgets composing Tier 2: data (table, tree), forms (form, wizard, stepper), search (combo, search, command bar), editors (smart input, rich editor), navigation (sidebar, nav menu, filter bar, shortcuts, arrow nav), social (5), onboarding (3), scheduling (4), workflow (3), visualization (6), media (5). Total 43 files.
evidence: lib/src/composites/data/oi_table.dart (1171 lines — sorting, filtering, pagination, virtual scroll, column reorder)
All 43 composite files present in correct subdirectories
issues: OiTable inline cell editing via OiEditable per cell not verified — composition map claims this relationship
OiKanban drag-and-drop via OiReorderable + OiDraggable/OiDropZone between columns not verified — OiKanban is in modules/ not composites/
OiComboBox use of OiVirtualList when virtualScroll=true not verified
OiChat use of both OiVirtualList and OiInfiniteScroll not verified — chat is in modules/
OiCommandBar use of OiFocusTrap, OiArrowNav, OiStagger not verified
Tier 3 test coverage not sampled — if similar to Tier 1/2 (37-48%), roughly 50% of spec-required test cases are missing
Golden tests for composites: none (empty golden directory)
OiRichEditor wraps flutter_quill per spec — but flutter_quill is not in pubspec.yaml dependencies, suggesting custom implementation or incomplete dependency

entries.title: Tier 4: Modules
entries.description: All 10 complete feature modules: OiListView, OiActivityFeed, OiMetadataEditor, OiComments, OiKanban, OiChat, OiFileManager, OiPermissions, OiDashboard, OiNotificationCenter.
issues: OiDashboard is only 202 lines — spec describes it as a full module with stagger animation for cards and complex layout
All modules depend on OiOverlays typed API (panel, dialog, toast) which is not implemented — modules may be calling a show() workaround or have broken integration
OiChat (407 lines) uses OiReactionData and OiFileData which are intentionally hidden from barrel export via `hide` — this could create issues for consumers who need these types
OiListView uses OiSelectionMode which is also hidden in the barrel — consumers needing custom selection modes cannot access the type
Module test coverage not individually verified — similar gaps expected as other tiers
No integration-level tests verified that modules compose their dependencies correctly

entries.title: Testing Strategy
entries.description: Comprehensive test coverage for all widgets: unit tests, widget tests, golden regression tests, responsive behavior tests, accessibility tests. Per-widget test tables are defined in the spec with 10-60+ test cases each.
evidence: test/ directory with 191 test files across all tiers
issues: Golden tests: test/src/golden/ directory exists with only .gitkeep — ZERO golden test files implemented. Spec requires golden regression tests for every widget variant in light/dark themes
OiApp: 6/17 spec-required tests implemented (35%) — missing: Ctrl+Z/Cmd+Z undo shortcuts, safe area, OiPlatform injection, orientation change, keyboard visibility, system back, performance tier
OiTappable: 13/35+ spec-required tests (37%) — missing: hover suppression on touch, press delay in scrollables, secondary tap fallback, long-press scroll distinction, cursor ignored on touch
OiButton: 29/60+ spec-required tests (48%) — missing all golden tests, theme scope override, per-instance style override, reduced motion, all responsive behavior tests
No check commands configured — test suite has never been run in CI per configuration
If 37-48% test coverage per component extrapolates to all 200+ widgets, ~700 of spec-required ~1500+ individual test cases are missing
Spec-required accessibility tests (screen reader on iOS VoiceOver, TalkBack, ARIA live regions) not present — platform semantics tests missing
Spec-required performance tests (100k items without OOM for OiVirtualList) not verified

testSummary: No test commands configured. 1412 testWidgets() calls exist across 187 test files, but the test suite was not executed during this audit. Golden test directory (test/src/golden/) is empty — 0 golden test files implemented despite infrastructure present. Known coverage gaps: OiApp 6/17 required tests (35%), OiTappable 13/35 required tests (37%), OiButton 29/60+ required tests (48%). The largest single gap is OiOverlays missing 8 of 9 typed API methods (panel, sheet, dialog, toast, commandBar, search, popover, contextMenu). OiUndoAction is missing showToast and expiry fields. OiButtonThemeScope, OiTourScope, and OiShortcutScope do not exist in the codebase.
